releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Use `activeDocument` in tray icon rendering for popout window compatibility by @Copilot in https://github.com/pedrojreis/Pebble/pull/12
* Chore: bump version by @pedrojreis in https://github.com/pedrojreis/Pebble/pull/13
* Fix: rollback activedocument by @pedrojreis in https://github.com/pedrojreis/Pebble/pull/14

## New Contributors
* @Copilot made their first contribution in https://github.com/pedrojreis/Pebble/pull/12

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pedrojreis/Pebble/compare/1.0.7...1.0.8
